_meta.description: Documentation frame metadata findings for carbon. Cluster 3 dimension 3.5. Generated by read-figma-doc-frames.mjs.

findings.description: 51 of 53 component pages have a real page-level description. 2 have placeholder or missing descriptions.
evidence: With description: About, Read me, Color, Effects, Spacing block, Screens, Utilities, Accordion, AI label, AI layer, AI explainability popover, Breadcrumb, Button, Checkbox, Code snippet, Contained list, Content switcher, Date picker, Data table, Dropdown, File uploader, Form, Link, List, Loading, Menu, Menu buttons, Modal, Notification, Number input, Pagination, Password input, Popover, Progress bar, Progress indicator, Radio button, Search, Select, Slider, Structured list, Tabs, Tag, Text input, Tile, Toggle, Toggletip, Tooltip, Tree view, UI shell - Header, UI shell - Left panel, UI shell - Right panel
Placeholder/missing: ——————————————, Text area
findings.recommendation: Page-level descriptions are the primary source of intent metadata readable from the Figma file. Replace placeholder text with functional descriptions.

findings.description: 0 of 196 sub-component sections have a real description. 196 have placeholder text or no description.
evidence: Total sub-components: 196
With real description: 0
With placeholder: 196
Coverage: 0%
findings.recommendation: Sub-component descriptions should contain functional intent: when to use the sub-component, constraints, and expected behaviour.

findings.description: Structural metadata: 4047 total variants across 196 sub-components, with 447 variant axes. This data is machine-readable and supports agent reasoning about component capabilities.

findings.recommendation: The variant and property structure is well-defined and extractable. Pair with descriptions that carry intent.
